name: Huntington Federal Savings Bank
description_short: Huntington Federal Savings Bank is a West Virginia-based FDIC-insured bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, and loan products across five branches in the Huntington area.
description_long:
Huntington Federal Savings Bank operates as a community-focused financial institution based in Huntington, West Virginia. The bank has been serving the region with a physical presence and maintains FDIC membership, providing deposit insurance protection for customer accounts. The institution emphasizes accessibility and modern banking conveniences alongside traditional branch services.

The bank offers a range of personal banking products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), individual retirement accounts (IRAs), debit cards, and mortgage services. Customers can apply for mortgages online with pre-approval available within minutes. The bank provides online banking, a mobile app, and digital bill payment services through BillMatrix Loan Pay, allowing customers to make mortgage payments from any checking account. Additional services include text and email alerts through Notifi, online check reordering, and access to physical branch locations with extended drive-through hours.

The bank distinguishes itself through its community presence with five branch locations (Main Office in Huntington, plus East Hills, Camden Road, Barboursville, and Teays Valley branches) and extended drive-through hours available six days a week. The institution has prioritized web accessibility through AudioEye optimization tools. All branches offer both lobby and drive-through services, with lobby hours typically 9am-4pm Monday-Thursday and 9am-6pm Friday, and drive-through service extending to 6pm weekdays and noon on Saturdays.

For consumers seeking traditional banking services in West Virginia, Huntington Federal offers stability through FDIC insurance and established brick-and-mortar locations. However, the bank's service area appears geographically limited to the Huntington metropolitan region, and the website provides minimal information about specific deposit rates, loan terms, or competitive offerings compared to larger regional or national institutions.
pros: FDIC member bank with deposit insurance protection for customer funds
Five physical branch locations with extended drive-through hours (open until 6pm weekdays, noon Saturdays)
Online mortgage application with pre-approval available within minutes
Mobile app and online banking platform for account management
Digital payment options including BillMatrix Loan Pay and Notifi alerts
AudioEye accessibility features for visually impaired users
Established community presence in Huntington, WV area
cons: Service area limited to West Virginia (five branches only in Huntington region)
Website provides no specific information on deposit rates, CD rates, or loan APRs
Limited geographic accessibility compared to regional or national banks
Website content appears outdated (copyright shows 2017; Google Maps data shows 2026)
best_for: West Virginia residents in the Huntington metropolitan area seeking traditional banking services
Homebuyers in the region interested in local mortgage origination
Consumers who prefer in-person banking relationships with established community institutions
Depositors prioritizing FDIC insurance and physical branch access
diagnosis: Huntington Federal Savings Bank is best for West Virginia residents in the Huntington area who value traditional community banking with physical branch access and FDIC protection. The main caveat is extremely limited geographic availability—the bank operates only five branches in one metropolitan region, making it unsuitable for customers outside West Virginia or those requiring multi-state access.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
